market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: This 4-guest holiday home offers luxury amenities including a private Jacuzzi bath and secure parking. Located in [city], it provides [insert local convenience facts if available]. While our rate is 31% above the market median (£230 vs £175), your review highlights can help us improve. Guests typically praise [specific guest favorite if available]. The property includes [list core features - kitchen, living area, etc.] ensuring comfort for all stays. With 76 open nights in the next 90 days, we're focused on optimizing visibility for potential guests seeking premium accommodation in [city].
analysis.photo_order_rec: Lead with the Jacuzzi bath shot to showcase the premium feature most guests would want to see immediately, followed by the parking space in second position per platform testing data.
key_diagnosis: £230 nightly rate is 31% above cohort median yet occupancy is 45% below median (15.2% vs 28.3%)
Title lacks urgency and has no clear primary differentiator within 50 characters
0-star description score due to complete absence of content - essential for driving conversion
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £230 rate is 31% above the market median, yet occupancy is at 15.2% (vs median 28.3%) - let's fix this revenue leak
